data.body: 568c completion-verifier FAILED on AC5 rollback_recovery: my test only covered read-time re-inference, not the fsck SNAPSHOT_STALE_CHANNEL detect + --repair-snapshots rebuild that AC5 requires (implementer's fsck code WAS complete; oracle under-tested it). Fixed: strengthened rollback_recovery test to assert fsck._check_snapshot surfaces SNAPSHOT_STALE_CHANNEL + fsck --repair-snapshots rebuilds compiled_state channel + finding clears. Preemptively pinned AC7 concurrency.md downgrade matrix too. Amended 568c (3be8f6bf1), re-pushed #766, commented evidence, self-rechecking poll running for Verified. Then re-close 568c -> submit -> close epic.
